content.full_text:
December 13, 1990

Mr. Mark Morodomi, Counsel  
Legal Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95812

Dear Mr. Morodomi:

Per your conversation with Sandy Miller, this date, please consider this letter my formal request to obtain a written opinion/response to confirm that it is, indeed, legal for me to enclose a California Lottery ticket to individuals who donated their time to work on my November re-election effort.

Since I am most anxious to send out thank you responses, your prompt reply would be very much appreciated. Thank you.

Sincerely,

RUBEN S. AYALA  
Senator, 34th District
